zh.lifeSummary: 當Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal於1291年2月8日出生在葡萄牙利斯波亞利斯波亞時，他的父親Dinis I de Portugal30歲，母親Santa Isabel de Aragão20歲。他於1309年與Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1325年被列為rey de portugal 。他去世於1357年5月28日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在葡萄牙利斯波亞利斯波亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal于1291年2月8日出生在葡萄牙利斯波亞利斯波亞时，他的父亲Dinis I de Portugal30岁，母亲Santa Isabel de Aragão20岁。他于1309年与Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1325年被列为rey de portugal 。他去世于1357年5月28日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在葡萄牙利斯波亞利斯波亞。

nameMeanings.name: Rey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Luis, Juan, Alfredo, Roberto, Alfonso, Angel, Eduardo, Jesus, Mariano, Carlos.

Spanish, Galician, and French (Occitan): from Spanish and Old French rey ‘king’ (from Latin rex, genitive regis), which may have denoted someone in the service of a king, or it may have been from the title of someone in a brotherhood or a nickname for someone who behaved in a regal fashion or who had earned the title in some contest of skill or by presiding over festivities. Compare Del Rey and Galician Rei .
English (Somerset): variant of   Ray  .

variants.name: Del Rey
meanings: Spanish: variant of Rey , with the preposition and definite article del ‘from/of the’.

variants.name: Reyes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Manuel, Luis, Jesus, Pedro, Ruben, Miguel, Roberto, Francisco, Ramon.
Spanish:
plural form of   Rey  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Portugal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Salvador, Alberto, Alejandra, Alejandro, Cesar, Fernando, Jesus, Luis, Manuel.  Portuguese Aderito.

Spanish, Portuguese, Catalan, French, English (Lincolnshire), and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): ethnic name or habitational name for someone from Portugal or who had connections with Portugal. The name of the country derives from Late Latin Portucale, originally denoting the district around Oporto (Portus Cales, named with Latin portus ‘port, harbor’ + Cales, the ancient name of the city). In some cases the surname may be simply a nickname for someone who had business connections with Portugal. The English surname is a rare variant of Pettengill .

variants.name: Pettengill
meanings: English: medieval English name for someone from Portugal (see Portugal ), from Middle English Portingal(e) ‘Portugal’ (Old French Portugalois), later also meaning ‘Portuguese’.

variants.name: Portal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Pedro, Carlos, Juan, Luis, Amado, Arnoldo, Caridad, Jose, Norberto, Ricardo, Rosa Elena, Tomas.  Portuguese Amadeu.  Jewish Arie, Ber, Shlomo, Yael, Ziva.  French Marcelle, Andre, Jean Luc.

Spanish, Catalan, Galician, Portuguese, southern French, and Jewish (Sephardic): topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a fortified town, typically the gatekeeper (from a word, Spanish portal, southern French porta(i)l, meaning ‘gate’); or a habitational name from any of the places in Portugal, Galicia, and France named Portal or, in France, Le Portal.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): possibly a shortened form of   Portugal  .

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

variants.name: Alonso
meanings: Variant of   Alfonso .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal was born on 8 February 1291, in Lisbon, Lisbon, Portugal, his father, Dinis I de Portugal, was 30 and his mother, Santa Isabel de Aragão, was 20. He married Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal in 1309. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1325, his occupation is listed as rey de portugal . He died on 28 May 1357, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Lisbon, Lisbon, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal est né le 8 février 1291, à Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal, son père, Dinis I de Portugal, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Santa Isabel de Aragão, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal en 1309. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1325, sa profession de son indiquée est rey de portugal . Il est décédé le 28 mai 1357, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal am 8. Februar 1291 in Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dinis I de Portugal 30 und seine Mutter Santa Isabel de Aragão 20. Er hat 1309 Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1325 ist sein Beruf als rey de portugal  aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Mai 1357 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal è nato il il 8 febbraio 1291 nel Lisboa, Lisboa, Portogallo, il suo padre, Dinis I de Portugal, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Santa Isabel de Aragão, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal nel 1309. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1325, la sua occupazione è indicata come rey de portugal . Morì il 28 maggio 1357, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Lisboa, Lisboa, Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: Alfonso IV Rey de Portugalが1291年2月8日にポルトガルリスボアリスボアで生まれた時，父Dinis I de Portugalは30歳，母Santa Isabel de Aragãoは20歳であった。1309年にBeatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1325年，職業はrey de portugal と記録されている。彼は1357年5月28日に故郷で66歳で死去し，ポルトガルリスボアリスボアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal(이)가 1291년 2월 8일 포르투갈 리스보 리스보에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dinis I de Portugal(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Santa Isabel de Aragão(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1309년 Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1325년, 그의 직업은 rey de portugal 이었다. 그는 1357년 5월 28일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 리스보 리스보에 묻혔다.

historicEvents.title: Portugal
historicEvents.description: Portugal is one of the oldest nations in Europe having established its continental frontier as it is set today in 1297

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal nasceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1291, em Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal, seu pai, Dinis I de Portugal, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Santa Isabel de Aragão, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal em 1309. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1325, sua profissão aparece como rey de portugal . Ele faleceu em 28 de maio de 1357, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal родился 8 февраля 1291 г. в местности лисбоа, лисбоа, Португалия, его отцу по имени Dinis I de Portugal было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Santa Isabel de Aragão, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal в 1309 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1325 году он работал по профессии rey de portugal . Он умер 28 мая 1357 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности лисбоа, лисбоа, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alfonso IV Rey de Portugal nació el 8 de febrero de 1291, en Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal, su papá, Dinis I de Portugal, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Santa Isabel de Aragão, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Beatriz De Castilla Reina De Portugal en 1309. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1325, su ocupación registrada era rey de portugal . Murió el 28 de mayo de 1357, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Lisboa, Lisboa, Portugal.
